hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}}"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE" in internal/generated/*) echo "STOP: Do not edit generated files in internal/generated/. Edit api/*.yaml and run make generate-openapi instead." >&2; exit 2;; postman/results-*|postman/test-results.json) echo "STOP: Do not edit generated Newman/Postman result artifacts. Update postman/*.postman_collection.json instead." >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}}"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE" in *.go) if command -v gofmt >/dev/null 2>&1; then gofmt -s -w "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi;; esac; exit 0'
